fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal template you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a brief description of the journal template you are creating.

fields.name: Test Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the test report that is printed when you click Test Report.

fields.name: Page ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the page that is used to show the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Posting Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting report that is printed when you choose Post and Print.

fields.name: Force Posting Report
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a report is printed automatically when you post.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal type.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the journal template will be a recurring journal.

fields.name: Test Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the test report that is printed when you print a journal under this journal template.

fields.name: Page Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the displayed name of the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Posting Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report that is printed when you print the journal.

fields.name: Force Doc. Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether transactions that are posted in the general journal must balance by document number and document type.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that a balancing entry is posted to, such as BANK for a cash account.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger, customer, vendor, or bank account that the balancing entry is posted to, such as a cash account for cash purchases.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign document numbers to ledger entries that are posted from journals using this template.

fields.name: Copy VAT Setup to Jnl. Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the program to calculate VAT for accounts and balancing accounts on the journal line of the selected journal template.

fields.name: Allow VAT Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to allow the manual adjustment of VAT amounts in journals.

fields.name: Cust. Receipt Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to print customer receipts when you post.

fields.name: Cust. Receipt Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to print customer receipts when you post.

fields.name: Vendor Receipt Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to print vendor receipts when you post.

fields.name: Vendor Receipt Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to print vendor receipts when you post.

fields.name: Increment Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies if batch names using this template are automatically incremented. Example: The posting following BATCH001 is automatically named BATCH002.

fields.name: Copy to Posted Jnl. Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the journal lines to be copied to posted journal lines of the selected journal template.

fields.name: Allow Posting Date From
fields.tooltip: Specifies the earliest date when posting to the journal template is allowed.

fields.name: Allow Posting Date To
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date when posting to the journal template is allowed.

fields.name: Unlink Inc. Doc On Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the the incoming document will be unlinked from the journal when it is posted. This option can be enabled only for recurring journals.
